topics: Sieve Analysis: To analyse a given sample using a set of standard sieves and thus to determine the specific surface area, the volume surface mean diameter and the mass mean diameter by differential analysis and cumulative analysis
Verification of the laws of crushing in a ball mill and calculation of critical speed
Study of the working of plate and frame filter press
Free settling: To find out the drag coefficient of a falling sphere in a fluid and verification of Stoke's law
Sedimentation: To study batch sedimentation of slurry and to determine the area of the continuous thickener
Heat transfer from steam to air: Determination of overall heat transfer coefficient
Verification of material balance equation and Rayleigh's equation for simple distillation
Leaching: Leaching a mixture of salt and sand
Study of the kinetics of chemical reaction in a batch reactor
Frequency response of first and second order systems
Determination of pH, turbidity, total hardness, total solids and dissolved oxygen of water samples
Determination of BOD and COD of waste water samples
Jar test for determining the optimum coagulant dose for water treatment
